description: Few-shot examples for email classification prompt. 3 examples per category (21 total). Used by buildClassificationPrompt() in types.js.

examples.subject: Review requested: Fix memory leak in worker pool #342
examples.snippet: F42k requested your review on pull request #342 in clawbot/backend. Changes include worker pool lifecycle management...
examples.reasoning: GitHub PR review request from a known repository. Direct action needed: review code changes.

examples.subject: [clawbot/backend] CI Build Failed on main - abc1234
examples.snippet: Build #891 failed. 3 test failures in worker_pool_test.js. See details at...
examples.reasoning: CI build failure notification on main branch. Indicates broken tests that may block other PRs.

examples.subject: Critical: Remote code execution in express < 5.1.0
examples.snippet: A critical vulnerability has been found in express versions below 5.1.0. Update immediately to patch CVE-2026-...
examples.reasoning: Security advisory for a dependency used in the project. Critical severity suggests immediate action needed.

examples.subject: Invitation: Team standup - Tomorrow 10:00 AM
examples.snippet: You have been invited to Team standup by Jane Doe. Tuesday, April 3 at 10:00 AM - 10:15 AM (Pacific Time).
examples.reasoning: Google Calendar meeting invitation requiring RSVP response.

examples.subject: Re: Can we move Thursday's 1:1 to Friday?
examples.snippet: Hey, something came up Thursday afternoon. Would Friday 2pm work instead? Same agenda...
examples.reasoning: Meeting reschedule request from a colleague. Needs calendar check and confirmation.

examples.subject: Reminder: Design Review in 30 minutes
examples.snippet: Your meeting Design Review starts in 30 minutes. Join at https://zoom.us/j/123...
examples.reasoning: Upcoming meeting reminder. No action needed other than joining at the scheduled time.

examples.subject: New paper: Efficient Multi-Agent Coordination via Shared Memory
examples.snippet: Authors: Chen et al. Abstract: We propose a novel approach to multi-agent coordination using shared memory banks that reduces communication overhead by 40%...
examples.reasoning: ArXiv paper alert on multi-agent systems, directly relevant to the project's agent architecture.

examples.subject: TLDR AI: GPT-5 benchmarks, Gemini 3 updates, Ollama 2.0
examples.snippet: Today's top AI news: OpenAI releases GPT-5 benchmark results showing 15% improvement on reasoning tasks. Google announces Gemini 3 Pro availability...
examples.reasoning: Tech newsletter covering AI developments. Informational content for staying current.

examples.subject: The Changelog Weekly: Node.js 23 LTS, Deno 3.0, Bun updates
examples.snippet: This week: Node.js 23 enters LTS, Deno 3.0 ships with full npm compat, and Bun adds native SQLite. Plus interviews with...
examples.reasoning: Developer-focused weekly digest with technology updates. Not time-sensitive.

examples.subject: Motion detected at Front Door
examples.snippet: Motion was detected at your Front Door camera at 2:35 AM. Tap to view the recording.
examples.reasoning: Home security camera alert. Late-night motion detection may warrant checking the recording.

examples.subject: Your March 2026 electricity bill is ready
examples.snippet: Your bill for the period Mar 1-31 is $142.50. Due date: April 15, 2026. View your bill online...
examples.reasoning: Monthly utility bill notification. Routine but has a due date requiring action.

examples.subject: Your package is out for delivery
examples.snippet: Your order #112-3456789 is out for delivery and will arrive today by 8 PM. Track your package...
examples.reasoning: Package delivery notification. Informational, no action required.
examples.recommended_action: No action needed, delivery in progress

examples.subject: CRITICAL: Production database connection pool exhausted
examples.snippet: Alert: PostgreSQL connection pool at 100% utilization. Service degradation detected on api-server-01. On-call engineer needed...
examples.reasoning: Production infrastructure alert indicating active service degradation. Requires immediate engineering response.

examples.subject: URGENT: Client demo moved to 2pm TODAY - prep needed
examples.snippet: The client demo originally scheduled for Thursday has been moved to today at 2pm. We need the dashboard prototype ready. Can you...
examples.reasoning: Urgent meeting change requiring immediate preparation. Both time-sensitive and calendar-related.

examples.subject: Security alert: New sign-in from unknown device

examples.reasoning: Account security alert from Google indicating potential unauthorized access. Requires immediate verification.

examples.snippet: Thank you for your order. Your estimated delivery date is April 5-7. Items: USB-C Hub, Monitor Stand...
examples.reasoning: Standard order confirmation. No action needed, just informational.

examples.reasoning: Monthly financial statement. Routine notification with a payment due date.

examples.snippet: Don't miss our biggest sale of the year! Save up to 70% on cables, chargers, cases and more. Use code FLASH70 at checkout...

examples.snippet: You've been selected to participate in a brief survey about your technology usage. Complete it in under 3 minutes and receive...
